## Verification

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make typecheck`

## Risk

- [ ] Public docs contain no private strategy, pricing or customer-specific details.
- [ ] New runtime dependencies are self-hostable or optional.
- [ ] Security, tenant, permission, audit and egress boundaries are preserved.
